#8Founder/CEOFoundation Models & LLMs

Sam Altman

OpenAI

Specialties

LLMsAGIAI Policy

Location

USA

Education

Dropped out of Stanford University (Computer Science, 2005). Former president of Y Combinator.

GitHub

~12K followers

Links & Profiles

LinkedIn 𝕏 Twitter Website GitHub Scholar

Timeline

2019Became CEO of OpenAI
2022Launched ChatGPT
2023GPT-4 launch & boardroom crisis
2025TIME Person of the Year

Jump to Section

QuoteBioInfluencePapersVideos
AIChatGPTPerplexityGemini

"AI will probably most likely lead to the end of the world, but in the meantime, there'll be great companies."

Biography

CEO of OpenAI. Led development of ChatGPT & GPT series. TIME Person of the Year 2025.

💡 My Take

Love or hate him, Altman is the most consequential figure in making AI mainstream. His YC background shaped his 'ship fast' approach to deploying GPT models. The boardroom drama of 2023 only reinforced his central role. His blog posts on 'Moore's Law for Everything' are essential reading for understanding how AI reshapes economics.

Key Influence

Put AI in the mainstream with ChatGPT. Navigating OpenAI's transformation into most valuable AI company.
